issue: User-controlled pathParam used directly in GitHub API URL without sanitization
fix: Validate and sanitize pathParam before using in URL construction

issue: User-controlled pathParam used directly in GitHub raw content URL without sanitization
fix: Validate and sanitize pathParam before using in URL construction

issue: Hardcoded empty string fallback for GEMINI_API_KEY exposes service to unauthorized usage
fix: Validate API key presence at startup and fail gracefully if missing

issue: Hardcoded absolute paths may cause portability issues or unintended file access
fix: Use relative paths or environment variables for configurable paths

issue: User-controlled data passed to subprocess.run via json.dumps
fix: Validate/sanitize artist names before subprocess invocation

issue: spawn() called with user-controllable pythonArgs including resolvedVoicePath and youtubeUrl
fix: Sanitize all user inputs before passing to child processes

issue: Missing audioUrl property causes runtime error when setting selectedSong from YouTube extract
fix: Initialize audioUrl properly in setSelectedSong call or ensure backend returns valid audioUrl

issue: MediaStream tracks not stopped if recording fails before MediaRecorder setup completes
fix: Wrap getUserMedia in try-finally and stop tracks on early return

issue: MediaStream tracks may leak if MediaRecorder fails to initialize
fix: Ensure stream.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()) runs even if recorder setup throws

issue: User-provided name parameter directly embedded in AI prompt without sanitization
fix: Sanitize/validate name input before including in prompt

issue: User-provided title and artist parameters directly embedded in AI prompt without sanitization
fix: Sanitize/validate title and artist inputs before including in prompt

issue: Incomplete migration logic may leave orphaned voice entries
fix: Implement comprehensive migration status tracking and rollback

issue: Parquet file operations lack atomicity guarantees
fix: Use temporary files and atomic rename for all parquet writes

issue: File move operations use unsanitized filenames
fix: Validate destination paths with os.path.join and basename

issue: Mock audio data written without proper cleanup or validation
fix: Add checksum/validation for mock files and cleanup routine

issue: userId used directly in file path without validation, allowing potential directory traversal
fix: Validate userId against ID_SAFE_RE before using in file paths

issue: userId used directly in file path without validation in voice upload route
fix: Validate userId against ID_SAFE_RE before using in file paths

issue: Generic error logging without user feedback for YouTube extraction failure
fix: Show user-friendly error toast/notification on extraction failure

issue: Silent failure when song upload or processing fails
fix: Add proper error handling with user notifications for failed uploads

issue: Silent failure when YouTube paste processing fails
fix: Add proper error handling with user notifications for failed YouTube processing

issue: Generic exception handling hides specific error details
fix: Catch specific exceptions and log detailed error information

issue: Filename-based path construction vulnerable to directory traversal
fix: Sanitize filenames using os.path.basename and validate extensions

issue: Temporary parquet files may not be cleaned up on failure
fix: Use try/finally block to ensure temp file cleanup

issue: Case-sensitive string comparison may miss valid matches
fix: Use case-insensitive comparison with .lower() consistently

issue: Child process stdout/stderr streams not explicitly closed, potential resource leak
fix: Add explicit cleanup for child process streams in dbInvoke

issue: Python child process not explicitly killed on job failure, potential zombie processes
fix: Implement proper cleanup and termination of child processes
